snippets.title: Content as wrapper
snippets.html:
Content with a component of type 'p' still renders the same when wrapped with a Content.

If located within a wrapping Content, html elements are styled as well!

snippets.title: Description list

Web
The part of the Internet that contains websites and web pages
HTML
A markup language for creating web pages
CSS
A technology to make HTML look better

snippets.title: Editorial content
snippets.html:
Example of editorial content via components

Duis volutpat rhoncus massa, quis convallis nisl. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nam velit diam, condimentum dapibus lobortis vitae, suscipit sodales eros. Nulla a tortor posuere, tempor turpis non, lacinia velit.


Example of editorial content via wrapper
